project: Tescan Group - Vyzkum a vyvoj new techniques for representing and reconstructing 3D image data from 2D projections
title: Tescan Group - Vyzkum a vyvoj novych metod reprezentace a rekonstrukce 3D obrazovych dat ze 2D projekci

english_title.label: English title
english_title.text: Tescan Group - Vyzkum a vyvoj new techniques for representing and reconstructing 3D image data from 2D projections

keywords.label: Keywords
keywords.text: electron microscopy, microCT, deep learning, ML, machine learning

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The goal of this collaboration is to connect the research and development capabilities of the TESCAN 3D & ML Solutions team and the AI/ML researchers at FIT to explore and develop key technological directions in microscopic and CT data processing focusing on techniques for 3D image reconstruction from 2D projections. Through this joint effort, we aim to lay the groundwork for innovative products.

team_members.label: Team members
team_members.text: Spanel Michal, doc. Ing., Ph.D. (DCGM) – research leader Cizmarik Roman, Ing. (DCGM) Kubik Tibor, Ing. (DCGM) Pukanec David, Ing. (DCGM) Silling Petr, Ing. (DCGM)
